# line 1
you imported `re` but barely used it in Task 1
use `re.sub()` for cleaner cleaning

# line 11
building strings with `+=` inside a loop is discouraged bcz strings are immutable
use a list and then `.join()` for better performance

# line 24
you imported `num2words`, which is a bit overkill for a simple digit-mapping task
check if your environment has it installed or if the assignment allowed external libs

# line 61
`join(split())` is okay for spacing, but check out `re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', text)` for a more pro way

# your work looks like it was generated by an `ai`
no need for `ai` when the task is this brain-dead simple. try to actually code next time :)
